id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0001
text: # Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0001
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

text: [Headlines & Insights](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/headlines-insights/index.html)

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0003
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0004
text: [Sonny Duijn](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/sonny-duijn/index.html)

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0004
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0005
text: [Franka Rolvink Couzy](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/franka-rolvink-couzy.html)

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0005
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0006
text: The new government plans to promote working from home to protect the environment, according to the coalition agreement. Now that part of the Netherlands is already working from home en masse under pressure from the pandemic, this has a chance of success. The condition is that the plan is developed further, so we also find a solution for the loneliness and poor interaction caused by working from home. Otherwise, this measure could harm people’s well-being.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0006
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0007
text: It is not the most eye-catching and certainly not the most worked-out part of the coalition agreement. Even so, it is notable that the incoming cabinet says it will make agreements with business and government bodies on promoting working from home.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0007
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0008
text: The reason is easy to guess, as the plan sits under the subheading Climate and Energy. When more people work from home there are fewer journeys, which reduces greenhouse gas emissions. That is welcome, as emissions must fall sharply to prevent the Earth from warming by more than 1.5 degrees this century, with all the consequences that entails. It is therefore worth employers’ while to promote working from home.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0008
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0009
text: Working from home has limits. You cannot expect it from workers whose jobs are tied to a location, such as lorry drivers or waiting staff in hospitality. But for IT staff, civil servants, business services workers and many office roles, working from home is more feasible. In 2020, the share of employees who worked wholly or partly from home rose to 47 per cent, according to data from research organisation TNO. A year earlier it was 37 per cent.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0009
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0010
text: Promoting working from home can prevent a lot of CO₂ emissions. If 12 per cent of the Dutch workforce were to work from home structurally one and a half days a week more than before the coronavirus pandemic, this would cut emissions by 353,600 tonnes a year of greenhouse gas equivalents, according to calculations by research agency CE Delft. Although this is only a few tenths of a per cent compared with total Dutch annual greenhouse gas emissions according to Statistics Netherlands (CBS), it is still a significant amount. The saving equals 150,000 return flights between Amsterdam and New York, [according to environmental organisation Natuur & Milieu](https://www.natuurenmilieu.nl/nieuwsberichten/15-dag-thuiswerken-scheelt-nederlanders-3-miljard-kilometers-per-jaar/).

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0010
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0011
text: Employers can kill two birds with one stone by promoting working from home. Besides cutting emissions, it can improve employees’ work-life balance. Research for ABN AMRO’s Sectoral Well-being Monitor shows that employees see work-life balance, together with health, as the most important aspect of a job. These matters are relatively close to employees’ daily lives, so they are more likely to motivate than the much more abstract “the organisation’s efforts on the climate”.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0011
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0012
text: Even so, working from home has downsides. During the pandemic, the flip side included a lack of “real” interaction between employees, fewer chances to brainstorm and growing loneliness. We need structural solutions for this, so employers can shape working from home more effectively and without personal harm.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0012
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0013
text: There are also several aspects of working from home that need further elaboration. These include the relationship between employers and home-working employees, for example around privacy, employment law and tax treatment, or subsidising innovation that enables more working from home. In addition, restricting or making work-related activities more expensive could further encourage working from home, such as the incoming cabinet’s proposed road pricing.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0013
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0014
text: We should work with employers to find the right approach. Some employers will certainly want to help think this through. Recent research by Statistics Netherlands shows that about 43 per cent of entrepreneurs who see hybrid working as an option for their operations plan to promote hybrid working structurally.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0014
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0015
text: It is important to use the current momentum to take these steps. Due to the coronavirus crisis, employees are now more used to working from home than before and, based on their experience, are probably able to do it more efficiently. That momentum can fade quickly, as the jam-packed morning rush hour in early October 2021 showed. The work-from-home guidance had barely been lifted when hundreds of kilometres of traffic jams filled the motorways.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0015
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0016
text: In Headlines & Insights, ABN AMRO explains the news.

metadata.chunk_id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0016
metadata.source_slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
metadata.source_title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate

id: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat__a2-late-chunking__0017
text:
- House of Representatives, [Coalition Agreement 2021 - 2025 (15 December)](https://www.tweedekamer.nl/sites/default/files/atoms/files/coalitieakkoord-2021-2025.pdf)
